svg.title: Hot Key Theft Impossibility — CAT+CSFS Dual Verification Blocks Output Redirection
svg.desc: Animated diagram showing how CAT+CSFS's CHECKSIGVERIFY + CSFS dual verification prevents a compromised hot key from redirecting vault funds to an attacker address. The vault output destination is cryptographically embedded in the script and cannot be bypassed.
svg.text: Hot Key Theft Impossibility — CSFS+CHECKSIG Dual Verification
